title: Fastcar ® Mixed Paint Brush Set (Pack of 5) - Professional Paint Brush Set - No Loss of Bristle Paintbrush Heads
features: The paint brush set is fantastic for use at home or as part of a professional trade person's tool box
Details of each brush : 1x 0.5" (12mm), 1x 1" (25mm), 1x 1.5" (38mm), 1 x 2" (50mm), 1 x2.5" (63mm) paint brushes
Synthetic bristles suitable for all paint types
description: Product Description Fastcar Paint Brush - Pack of 5 Unleash your creativity with our versatile Paint Brush set. This must-have set features carefully crafted brushes in various sizes. Experience superior quality, precision and control with our Paint Brush Pack of 5. Uses of Fastcar Paint Brushes Smooth Strokes With No Bristle Loss Say goodbye to frustrating bristle shedding - our brushes are crafted to ensure minimal loss of bristles during your painting sessions. Enjoy uninterrupted strokes and achieve flawless results. Upgrade your painting experience today and enjoy the durability and performance of our bristle-friendly brushes. Paints Friendly This pack is your ultimate toolkit for various applications. Perfect for water based paints, watercolours, oils and more. Elevate your creativity and achieve professional results with our multi-purpose brush pack. Comfortable Grip Designed with your comfort in mind, each brush features an ergonomic handle that provides a comfortable grip. Say goodbye to hand fatigue and hello to hours of enjoyable painting. You'll have the perfect brush for any DIY project. Fast Car Paint Brush Pack of 5 Different Sizes For Different Uses This pack includes five meticulously crafted brushes, each with a different size and purpose. Whether you're a DIY enthusiast, a hobbyist, or an aspiring artist, these brushes will become your go-to tools for various projects around the home. Easy To Clean Cleaning up has never been easier! Our brushes are designed for effortless cleaning, ensuring a hassle-free experience. Simply rinse to remove any paint residue after use. Spend more time creating and less time cleaning. Well Finished Outcome Each brush is expertly crafted to provide precise control and smooth strokes, allowing artists to effortlessly express their creativity. The bristles are made from quality materials that ensure optimal paint pick-up and smooth application, resulting in even and vibrant colours on any surface. Specifications of Fastcar Paint Brush Pack of 5 Why Fastcar Mixed Paint Brushes? Light Weight Comfortable Handles Easy to Clean Multi-purpose 5 Different Sizes of Fastcar Paint Brushes Whats Included ? 1 x 0.5" (12mm) 1 x 1" (25mm) 1 x 1.5" (38mm) 1 x 2" (50mm) 1 x 2.5" (63mm)
